title: Exec Metrics Copilot
summary: Turn KPI changes into plain-language executive summaries with linked operational context.

sample_features.query: Summarize the highest priority risk and recommended next step.

knowledge_base: Exec Metrics Copilot is positioned as a Executive Analytics starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Turn KPI changes into plain-language executive summaries with linked operational context.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on executive, summaries, analytics.

app_modules.label: Workflow 01
app_modules.title: Routing Simulator
app_modules.description: Preview how a request gets prioritized or routed through the workflow.
app_modules.hint: Routing score and top signals will appear here.

app_modules.label: Workflow 02
app_modules.title: Operator Brief
app_modules.description: Generate a concise recommended action set for the current workflow state.
app_modules.hint: Operator brief and recommended actions will appear here.

app_modules.label: Workflow 03
app_modules.title: Grounded Prompt
app_modules.description: Ask a targeted question and inspect the support context behind the answer.
app_modules.prefill: What is the top priority recommendation for Exec Metrics Copilot?
app_modules.hint: Grounded answer and context excerpts will appear here.
